title: Keep Parashari whole-sign bhavas separate from KP cusps

positions.summary: Assign twelve whole-sign bhavas beginning with the sidereal lagna sign.
Do not manufacture KP cusps from whole-sign houses; publish stellar identities only.

default_policy.rationale: The Parashari module may use whole signs while the bounded KP module emits no cusp claims.

user_disclosure: Whole-sign house numbers belong to the Parashari structural layer and are not represented as KP Placidus cusps.
